issues.description: Effect structure is fundamentally wrong. Card text describes a choice ('Your opponent chooses one') between two mutually exclusive actions, but DSL lists both actions sequentially without any choice/conditional logic. Should use conditions or separate effects with mutually exclusive triggers.

RemoveLife is incorrect. 'Trash 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards' means removing from opponent's Life stack, not dealing damage. This should be a Life trash action targeting opponent, not a RemoveLife (which typically damages). Correct action should reference opponent Life pile specifically.

FlipLife is incorrect. 'Add 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards' means moving a deck card to Life pile (like drawing into Life), not flipping Life. Should be custom Life-add action or similar, not FlipLife.
Missing choice/decision logic. DSL must represent that opponent chooses between two options - current structure executes both unconditionally.

suggestedDsl.note: Requires choice mechanic not fully represented in standard DSL. Suggest: either two separate conditional effects based on opponent choice state, or extended DSL with 'choice' field: [{'trigger':'OnPlay','choice':{'prompt':'Choose one:','options':[{'description':'Trash 1 from opponent Life','actions':[{'type':'TrashOpponentLife','count':1}]},{'description':'Add 1 from your deck to your Life','actions':[{'type':'AddDeckToLife','count':1}]}]}}]
